source_fix.summary: When built-in tools are enabled and the latest user message explicitly names exactly one available tool, the panel now sends a specific tool_choice for Chat Completions and Responses. Multiple named tools and no explicit tool name remain unpinned.
source_fix.reason: Direct MiMo JANG_2L probes showed single-tool auto mode and full-surface required mode can call run_command, while full panel auto mode can exceed the prompt/context budget or overload tool selection.

direct_server_boundary.full_panel_auto_failure: Full panel auto nonstream returned HTTP 413 and stream logged prompt_too_long at 4754 tokenized prompt tokens with max 4096. Required/specific run_command still produced a tool call.

assertion_failures: requested real built-in tools but proof did not record long_tool_loop surface
app_attempts.tool_result: run_command executed on both turns, but MiMo mutated requested file/content semantics.
app_attempts.observed_first_assistant: REAL_UI_LAND_TOOL_ONE has been written to `/tmp/real_ui_land_tool_one.txt. The command successfully created the file with the specified content.
app_attempts.observed_second_assistant: REAL_UI_LIVE_TOOL_TWO has been written to /tmp/real_ui_land_tool_two.txt. The command successfully created the file with the specified content.

assertion_failures: UI turn ended with empty visible assistant content
requested real built-in tools but proof did not record long_tool_loop surface
app_attempts.prompt_shape: Explicit exact printf/cat shell commands with fixed working directory /tmp/vmlx-mimo-jang2l-toolproof-after-toolchoice-20260610.
app_attempts.observed_first_assistant: The user wants me to run run a specific command with the exact argument:

proven: MiMo JANG_2L loads in the real Electron dev-app harness on the 128GB host.
The panel request fix emits specific tool_choice only for explicit single built-in tool names.
The app can execute MiMo-generated run_command tool calls after the fix.
MiMo JANG_2L app runs expose mixed_swa_kv_v1 / mimo_v2_asymmetric_swa native cache, paged cache hits, and block-disk L2 writes.
No raw parser/tool markup leak or reasoning language leak was observed in the app attempts.
not_proven: MiMo JANG_2L robust app tool exactness.
MiMo JANG_2L Responses API tool path.
Installed-app parity and signed DMG release readiness for this fix.
release_boundary: This is a scoped fix and proof summary. It does not clear MiMo JANG_2L for robust checkpoint tool use and does not authorize package/sign/notarize/tag/download release actions.
